metadata.label: Default Embedding Provider (WSO2)
metadata.description: WSO2 embedding provider implementation that provides embedding capabilities using WSO2's AI service.

metadata.label: OpenAI Embedding Provider
metadata.description: EmbeddingProvider provides an interface for interacting with OpenAI Embedding Models.

metadata.label: Openrouter Embedding Provider
metadata.description:
EmbeddingProvider is a client class that provides an interface for generating
vector embeddings via the OpenRouter unified API, which supports embedding models
from OpenAI, Google, Mistral, and other providers.
